description: Bento grid layout with 1 large feature card spanning 2 columns and 4 smaller cards. Each has icon, title, description.

fields.name: Subheading
fields.default: A thoughtfully designed platform where every feature works together seamlessly.

fields.name: Description
fields.default: Every millisecond matters. Our edge network delivers your site from 200+ locations worldwide, with automatic image optimization and code splitting built in.

default.Title: Blazing Fast Performance
default.Description: Every millisecond matters. Our edge network delivers your site from 200+ locations worldwide, with automatic image optimization and code splitting built in.

default.Title: Enterprise Security
default.Description: SOC 2 certified, SSO, 2FA, and role-based access control for your entire team.

default.Title: Real-time Sync
default.Description: Changes propagate instantly across all team members. No refresh needed.

default.Title: Deep Analytics
default.Description: Understand visitor behavior with privacy-first analytics built right in.

default.Title: API First
default.Description: Full REST and GraphQL APIs. Build custom integrations and automations.
